title: Pricing Analyst Retail (all genders)
required_skills: 3+ years experience in pricing, revenue management or comparable analytical role in B2C Fashion Retail or E-Commerce
Strong analytical and quantitative skillset (price analysis, forecasting, scenario simulation, optimization)
Solid understanding of commercial KPIs (margin, sell-through, competitiveness, inventory risk)
bonus_skills: High level of ownership and proactivity in complex organizations
Stakeholder management and communication to senior management
matched_skills: 4+ years analytical experience across international markets
Data storytelling and executive reporting (C-level data storytelling)
Marketing KPI framework design (partial overlap with commercial KPIs)
Market segmentation and competitive intelligence (partial overlap with competitor pricing analysis)
A/B testing and experiment design (partial overlap with pricing experiments)
missing_skills: Pricing-specific experience (price analysis, scenario simulation, price elasticity modeling)
core_responsibilities: Drive and coordinate weekly short- and mid-term pricing activities for Retail Stores aligned with market, competitive and stock situations
Define and continuously refine country-, category- and store-specific pricing strategies considering local market dynamics
Monitor and analyze competitor pricing in offline retail, translating insights into pricing actions balancing competitiveness and profitability
Analyze price elasticity and demand response in a retail context to steer pricing decisions proactively
Partner with Buying, Retail Operations, Supply and Analytics teams to ensure pricing decisions are executed in store
recommended_emphasis: Quantitative analytics skills: highlight any experience with large datasets, forecasting, or scenario modeling
Commercial KPI experience: reframe marketing ROI and funnel analytics in terms of commercial trade-offs (margin vs. volume)
Competitive intelligence work at Minth Group: position as market pricing observation and benchmarking
E-commerce analytics at ECE Group: demonstrate understanding of online retail performance metrics
Cross-functional collaboration: emphasize coordination across Buying, Supply or Operations-type teams
Proactivity and ownership mindset: surface examples of independently driving analyses to completion

company_info.size_raw: employs around 2,300 people from over 90 nations
